user.title: Configure WattWatcher
user.description: Select a power sensor and define your operational states. States are evaluated in sequence (State 1 to 6). Each state activates when the power is below or equal to its Max Watt threshold.

data.name: Device Name (e.g., PC, Washing Machine)
data.state_1_max_watt: State 1 Max Watt (Active from 0W up to this value)
data.state_2_max_watt: State 2 Max Watt (Must be higher than State 1)
data.state_3_max_watt: State 3 Max Watt (Leave empty if this is your final highest state)
data.state_4_max_watt: State 4 Max Watt (Leave empty if this is your final highest state)
data.state_5_max_watt: State 5 Max Watt (Leave empty if this is your final highest state)
data.state_6_max_watt: State 6 Max Watt (Catches everything above the previous threshold)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure WattWatcher
reconfigure.description: Adjust the source power sensor or fine-tune the maximum watt thresholds for your operational states.

error.overlapping_thresholds: Invalid order! Each Max Watt threshold must be strictly higher than the previous one (e.g., State 2 Watt > State 1 Watt).

init.title: WattWatcher Options
init.description: Adjust the source power sensor or fine-tune the maximum watt thresholds for your operational states.

error.overlapping_thresholds: Invalid order! Each Max Watt threshold must be strictly higher than the previous one (e.g., State 2 Watt > State 1 Watt).
